pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: Too obvious. They want us angry. Angry soldiers miss traps.

pre_mission.speaker: Draven
pre_mission.line: Cautious soldiers leave innocents to bleed at toll gates.

pre_mission.speaker: Sera
pre_mission.line: Argue after the living are safe.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: The one where you think holding everyone together means breaking privately.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: Good. It means your heart still knows this matters.

battle_start.speaker: Aric
battle_start.line: Take the bridge and keep the rear clear.

battle_start.speaker: Zephyr
battle_start.line: I can do dramatic and practical at the same time.

post_mission.speaker: Kain
post_mission.line: We won. That is not the same thing as being safe.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: Then we move before safety gets expensive again.
